description:
Daily 8 AM PHT cron — Track 2 janitor for Stage 7 (Assessment Sent)
applicants.

For each Stage-7 applicant past the 48h threshold:
- Identify which of the 3 assessments are still incomplete; if any
  missing, stamp the pending-links HTML into the scratch
  x_studio_assessment_pending_links field on the applicant, then send
  the dedicated assessment-reminder template (which renders that
  field inline). Cascades:
    - first miss → Assessment Reminder (Partial Bundle)
      + stamp x_studio_assessment_reminder_date
    - second miss → Final Assessment Reminder + stamp
      x_studio_assessment_final_reminder_date + clear
      x_studio_assessment_sms_reminder_date (mirrors 009's behaviour)
    - third miss → archive with "Refuse did not complete assessment"
- All done → check scoring_success on each input:
    - Any failed → kanban_state=blocked + REVIEW NEEDED chatter
    - All passed → advance to Stage 10 (Passed Assessment)

Reuses existing state='new' survey.user_input rows where possible
instead of creating fresh ones on every cron run (previously every
run minted new tokens, leading to orphan inputs piling up).

Ships:
  - x_studio_assessment_reminder_date (datetime — last-action date)
  - x_studio_assessment_pending_links (html — scratch field rendered
    inside the reminder templates)
  - Three mail.template records: assessment-general, assessment-final,
    score-failure
  - The SA + the daily cron pointing at the SA

Reuses 009's "Recruitment: Refuse did not complete assessment"
template by name for the archive farewell. Deploy 009 first.

model_id=662 (hr.applicant).
